name: Wall Shelf Black Metal - Brightroom™: 2-Tier Storage, Open Cubes, No-Tool Assembly, 14.7" H x 18.1" W
description:
Add extra storage into any bathroom with limited floor space with this Wall Shelf from Brightroom™. This wall mount storage rack features a two-tiered design in a black metal rust-resistant finish for classic style that coordinates with any decor. The open structure designed with two slatted shelves provide ample space to store and display towels, potted plants, bath items, toiletries and more in one place. Pair with other pieces in the same collection to complete the cohesive look.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
